changelog: BIG WIN — Cloud DVR is here. Record live channels, see them in My Recordings (TV + Mobile), 5-hour quota per profile. Recordings play back instantly on tap with a real seek bar.

BIG WIN — Sports & PPV section. Live game cards show team logos, scores and broadcast times pulled from TheSportsDB, with an EPG-driven channel picker that finds which of YOUR Xtream channels is airing each game.
Long-press OK on any live channel now opens a polished actions sheet — Add to Favorites, Set Reminder, and Record Now in one place. Mirrored on TV and Mobile.
Recording is automatically blocked on channels without a program guide so you never start a runaway capture by accident.

Movie audio now works for DTS / DTS-HD / AC3 / EAC3 / TrueHD / FLAC / Opus / Vorbis tracks via a software audio decoder fallback — fixes the long tail of movies that previously played silently on Android TV / NVIDIA SHIELD.
Fixed the bright vertical line glitch on the right edge of dark scenes by routing the player surface through GPU compositing.
Lite Mode toggle in Settings strips heavy animations (Ken Burns, glow effects) for older / lower-end TV boxes.
App-wide BACK navigation now correctly returns you to the tab you were on instead of resetting to Home.

Many smaller polish fixes: faster EPG loading, more reliable focus handling on the side rails, smoother poster grids on Streaming Services / Collections / Genres / Years / Themes & Moods, and Continue Watching surfaces as the default first section when you have anything in progress.
